The '''Assemblage of Three''' was the governing body of the [[Tunroth]]. Made up of the three [[Tunroth Hunter]]s of highest rank, it dealt with issues that concerned all Tunroth, such as the need to deal with an external threat, alleviate overcrowding or colonize new worlds. The Assemblage of Three advocated the simultaneous colonization of [[Jiroch-Saloch]] and [[Jiroch-Kalok|Kalok]], which, together with the original homeworld of [[Jiroch-Reslia]], became known as the [[Triumvirate (planets)|Triumvirate]] in recognition of the vital role the Assemblage played.
